# Ground Units — cmano-db.com

> Derived extract: mobile ground-unit records (Mobile Vehicle(s), Mobile Vehicle(s) - Wheeled/Tracked, Mobile Personnel) filtered from facility.md · Source corpus captured 2026-05-29, database version 511 · 3289 records, grouped by country/operator.

Data derived from the Command: Modern Air/Naval Operations game database via the community viewer cmano-db.com. The site reserves rights for AI-training/-input/search use (EU Dir. 2019/790 Art. 4); this capture is personal/internal design reference only. cmo-db.com does not publish a distinct "ground units" URL category — these records are a filtered subset of the facility corpus (facility.md), selected by `| Type |` value: Mobile Vehicle(s), Mobile Vehicle(s) - Wheeled, Mobile Vehicle(s) - Tracked, Mobile Personnel. facility.md remains the complete superset; this file is a derived convenience view, not an independently-scraped corpus.
